events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1023. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: sesame. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes kidney beans. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Mission.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Matched: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 351/700 mg ✓, carbs 41 g (target 35–70) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Tabbouleh with Grilled Chicken
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 378/700 mg ✓, carbs 40 g (target 35–70) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hearty Lentil Soup with Vegetables
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 410/700 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 35–70) ✓, no sesame ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1023 added to route R-MISS-1 (Mission), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1023: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
